title: Gamend
description: **Open source** Elixir game server for **real-time** multiplayer games.

features.title: Authentication & Users
features.description: Email, Magic-link, OAuth, JWT and Session. Register, login, reset password and verify email.

features.title: Lobbies, Parties & Matchmaking
features.description: Real-time lobbies and ephemeral parties. Customizable settings with live updates.

features.title: Friends, Groups & Chat
features.description: Friend requests, blocking, real-time presence. Public, private and hidden groups. Direct and group messaging.

features.title: Achievements, Leaderboards & Notifications
features.description: Server-authoritative achievements and leaderboards. Real-time notifications across all features.

features.title: Server Scripting & Scheduling
features.description: Extend server logic with Elixir scripts. Schedule automated tasks and cron jobs.

features.title: HTTP, WebSocket & WebRTC
features.description: REST API, real-time WebSocket channels and low-latency WebRTC DataChannels. Admin portal and web UI.
